DVL sensor confirmed PASS in Progress Log (2026-07-14, 4/4 sensors), but no world_name:= recorded in any doc at that time. Smoke-tested via test_worlds.sh (2026-07-22): process stayed alive 32s, no crash -- see notes/results/dvl_world.log.

Root cause confirmed AND fixed same day. Original bug: 'Unable to find uri[https://fuel.gazebosim.org/1.0/hmoyen/models/North-East-Down frame]' (404) -- the world file's Fuel URI used hyphens ('North-East-Down frame') where the working dave_ocean_waves.world uses spaces ('North East Down frame') for the identical model. Fixed: patched the URI to use spaces (patches/new_dvl_uri_fix.diff). Verified live: patched world file copied into the running container, re-run survived the full 15s test window with no 404/error (only two harmless SDF warnings about latitude_deg/longitude_deg not being defined elements). Fix not yet applied to the Docker image build -- see notes/results/new_dvl.log for the original failure.

Confirmed exact command (2026-07-18): dave_robot.launch.py world_name:=ocean_current_plugin (README.md line 56, 166). ros2 service list | grep -i current verified real /hydrodynamics/ service names. RESOLVED discrepancy (2026-07-22): a bare re-run without namespace hit '[Errno 2] No such file or directory: .../dave_robot_models/config/robot_config.py' -- root-caused to dave_robot.launch.py always requiring namespace to match one of dave_robot_models/config/{rexrov,bluerov2,bluerov2_heavy,bluerov2_heavy_multibeam_sonar,glider_slocum}/robot_config.py (no generic default exists). Re-run with namespace:=rexrov: PASS, 33s alive, no crash. See notes/results/ocean_current_plugin.log.

Root cause confirmed AND fixed same day. Original crash: gz sim SERVER process (-s flag) aborts (SIGABRT, exit 134) on a libstdc++ std::normal_distribution assertion failure ('_M_stddev > 0' failed) -- UsblTransponder.cc:263 constructs the distribution with sigma taken unvalidated from the world file, which set <sigma>0.0</sigma> on both UsblTransponder plugin instances. Fix applied: patched sigma 0.0 -> 0.0001 in usbl_tutorial.world (patches/usbl_sigma_fix.diff). Verified live: patched world file copied into the running container, re-run survived the full 15s test window with no assertion/abort (previously died within ~3s). Fix not yet applied to the Docker image build (docker/lyrical.arm64v8.dockerfile) or upstream-reported -- see notes/usbl-gui-crash-investigation.md.
